title: Consolidated CSD Evidence Evaluation: Revised Success Criteria, Indicator Ranking, and Final Hypothesis Verdict
summary: Demo notebook for the Consolidated CSD Evidence Evaluation, which evaluates Critical Slowing Down indicators across 4 task families, 9 LLMs, and 6 experiments. The notebook runs 6 analysis blocks (success criteria SC1-SC3, indicator ranking, negative controls with random null distribution, temperature synthesis, cross-experiment consistency via Fleiss' kappa, and paper figure specs) on a curated mini dataset. Produces a 3-panel visualization showing indicator ranking, success criteria pass/fail, and CSD indicator trends vs difficulty. Overall verdict: PARTIALLY_CONFIRMED (2/3 criteria passed).
